companies.name: Vision On Line GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Vision On Line GmbH. Vision On Line GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Vision On Line is a company that develops machine vision and robotic solutions to optimize production and ensure quality. They offer system development and application solutions, including 3d bin-picking, 3d picking ki, sorting and checking, packaging, durability, electrical connections, and presshärten. They provide a range of technologies and partner services, including technology and technology. Vision On Line GmbH employs 5 people, founded in 2020. Headquartered in Langenselbold, Hesse, Germany.
[...]
Technologien der industriellen Bildverarbeitung und Robotik sind unsere Basis für die automatisierte Qualitätssicherung. 
Wir bieten langjährige Erfahrung, Marktübersicht und Applikations Know-how an und begleiten Ihre Vision Projekte bis zum 'go On Line' im 24/7/365 Betrieb.

We create Machine Vision & Robotics solutions.

Our mission is to provide a response to industrial production companies needs, for better, faster and more reliable inspection solutions.

Intelligent and digitally interconnected systems are the technical basis for this. With the growing help of Artificial Intelligence and Deep Learning, we today solve tasks, that seemed impossible yesterday.

companies.name: aku.automation GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
aku.automation GmbH. aku.automation GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. aku is a company that specializes in industrial image processing. They offer customized solutions to help businesses achieve efficiency and quality assurance. Aku.automation GmbH employs 19 people (-13.8% YoY, -4 people), founded in 2007. Headquartered in Aalen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, with presence in Indonesia.
[...]
With more than 40 highly qualified employees, aku.automation GmbH has developed from a local high-tech company into a global specialist in the field of industrial image processing. Many customers, such as u.a. Milka, VW, Bosch, Paulaner, Hochland, Daimler and Varta rely on us all over the world - and thus on maximum process reliability in their companies. Innovative competence and the courage to innovate are among the corporate DNA of aku.automation.
[...]
We always provide you the optimal components and systems as well as the best services. As a partner of the world's leading specialists, we have access to their components and resources, which directly benefits our customers. Furthermore we have high-quality in-house developments in our portfolio in the fields of optics, lighting and software.
[...]

companies.name: EyeSpec
companies.shortDescription:
EyeSpec-FAW Group. EyeSpec-FAW Group is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. The eyespec-faw group is a pioneer in the industrial and automated image processing industry, providing customized, schlüsselfertige solutions. They are a technology partner for renowned customers worldwide, understanding the complexity associated with automation and offering innovative solutions tailored to the individual needs of their clients. EyeSpec-FAW Group employs 6 people (+18.2% YoY, +2 people), founded in 2012. Headquartered in Hemmingstedt, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.
[...]
EyeSpec-FAW Group is based as EyeSpec GmbH in Hemmingstedt/ Heide, Schleswig-Holstein and as FAW Industrial Automation in Leonberg/ Stuttgart in Germany.
[...]
We deliver turnkey machine vision systems for Automotive, Pharma, Medical and many more industries. 
Our customers chose us because of the top notch technologies combined with the best service.
